_about: Golden values for the maxent.jar v3.4.4 ↔ QMaxent v0.1.7 numerical comparison reported in § 3.3 (Table 3, Fig. 4) of the SoftwareX manuscript. These values were produced once, offline, by running both implementations on the Pitta nympha dataset of Lee et al. (2025, GECCO 60:e03939) with random_seed=42. The regression suite checks current QMaxent runs against these values with the documented tolerances.

default._label: Default — β = 1, Geographic K-Fold (5-fold). Used to demonstrate the auto-feature rule + the default spatial CV scheme.

lee_matched._label: Lee-matched — β = 4, Random K-Fold (10-fold). Reproduces the configuration ENMeval selected in Lee et al. (2025).

permutation_importance_spearman_rho._note: Discussed in § 3.3 as an expected consequence of β=4 + n=47 over-regularisation (Merow et al. 2013). NOT tolerance-checked — see manuscript discussion for interpretation.

_tolerance_rationale: Training-AUC tolerance is 0.005 because § 2.3 documents a micro-convergence gap between IWLR (elapid) and coordinate descent (maxnet R / maxent.jar) of comparable magnitude. Spearman ρ tolerance is 0.05 because we only assert qualitative rank agreement at β=1 — a 0.05 wobble does not change any of the manuscript's interpretations.

_provenance.regenerated: before each minor release of QMaxent; see docs/golden-values.md
